title: Crispy Peruvian Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A fresh and adventurous peruvian dish featuring crispy sweet potatoes drizzled with dark soft brown sugar, seasoned for a touch of sweetness and spice, perfect as a diabetic-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: about half a teaspoon of garlic powder can be used as a substitute for the fresh ones

instructions: Wash the sweet potatoes and scrub off any dirt. Cut them into thin slices, about 1/8-inch thick.
In a shallow dish, toss the potato slices with olive oil, salt, and finely chopped garlic. Toss well to coat evenly.
Spread the coated potato slices in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy, stirring halfway through cooking time.
In another small saucepan over medium heat, melt the dark soft brown sugar with red chili flakes. Stir continuously to prevent burning.
Once the sweet potatoes are roasted and cool enough to handle, stir in the caramelized sugar mixture evenly across all slices.
Garnish with fresh cilantro before serving.
